title: Grain boundary engineered aluminum current collector for energy-dense initially anode-free sodium metal batteries
abstract: Nature Communications, Published online: 06 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-74177-8 The initially anode-free sodium metal offer advantages in energy density and safety. title: Bioinspired nano-architecture for cellulose fibers with spider silk–like toughness
abstract: Nature Communications, Published online: 06 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-74052-6 Cellulose fibers derived from renewable biomass offer great tensile strength performance, but their toughness remains limited.
